message:
fix: route cross-rig agent bead operations to correct database (gt-mh3tb)

When a polecat manager creates an agent bead for a different rig (e.g.,
bd-beads-polecat-obsidian from gastown), bd create routes correctly via
prefix routing, but the fallback path Show/Update/reopen calls used the
local rig BEADS_DIR, which does not route cross-rig. This caused all
beads rig polecat slings to fail with duplicate primary key after the
first spawn, since the reopen fallback could never find the existing bead.

Fix: use ResolveRoutingTarget to create a correctly-pointed Beads instance
for all fallback operations (show, update, reopen) in CreateOrReopenAgentBead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
